definitions: A spherical mass of flavored cheese, often served as an appetizer with crackers.
A snack food consisting of small, puffed corn spheres coated in cheese powder.
A person who is overly sentimental, corny, or lacking in sophistication.
examples: She served a walnut-crusted cheeseball at the party.
He ate a whole bag of orange cheeseballs.
Stop being such a cheeseball with those romantic poems.
